rootNode.ResponseMSG: The INSERT statement conflicted with the FOREIGN KEY constraint "fk_ComplainLines_NatureId". The conflict occurred in database "JobCardPivotal", table "dbo.tbl_Nature", column 'NatureId'. The statement has been terminated.
